parameters.query:
SELECT
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as orders,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur), 2) as revenue_eur,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur) * rub_per_eur, 0) as revenue_rub,
  ROUND(
    SUM(total_eur) * rub_per_eur *
    CASE segment WHEN 'Nutaku' THEN 0.40 ELSE 0.07 END,
    0
  ) as margin_rub,
  rub_per_eur as rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    (mo.content->>'total')::numeric / 100 as total_eur,
    ROUND(1.0 / cx.exchange_rate, 2) as rub_per_eur,
    CASE
      WHEN mo.content->'items'->0->>'brand' = 'Nutaku' THEN 'Nutaku'
      WHEN mo.order_data->>'source' = 'yandex_market' THEN 'YandexMarket'
      ELSE 'SEO'
    END as segment
  FROM marketplace_order mo
  CROSS JOIN (SELECT exchange_rate FROM currency WHERE code = 'RUB') cx
  WHERE mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
    AND mo.updated_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND mo.updated_at < CURRENT_DATE
) sub
GROUP BY segment, rub_per_eur
ORDER BY segment

SELECT
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as orders,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur), 2) as revenue_eur,
  ROUND(SUM(total_eur) * rub_per_eur, 0) as revenue_rub,
  ROUND(
    SUM(total_eur) * rub_per_eur *
    CASE segment WHEN 'Nutaku' THEN 0.40 ELSE 0.07 END,
    0
  ) as margin_rub,
  rub_per_eur as rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    (mo.content->>'total')::numeric / 100 as total_eur,
    ROUND(1.0 / cx.exchange_rate, 2) as rub_per_eur,
    CASE
      WHEN mo.content->'items'->0->>'brand' = 'Nutaku' THEN 'Nutaku'
      WHEN mo.order_data->>'source' = 'yandex_market' THEN 'YandexMarket'
      ELSE 'SEO'
    END as segment
  FROM marketplace_order mo
  CROSS JOIN (SELECT exchange_rate FROM currency WHERE code = 'RUB') cx
  WHERE mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
    AND mo.updated_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
    AND mo.updated_at < CURRENT_DATE
) sub
GROUP BY segment, rub_per_eur
ORDER BY segment
